CustomField.description: Provides a visual representation of lead quality using a star rating system based on the Lead Score.
CustomField.formula:
IMAGE( IF(Lead_Score__c >= 50, "/img/samples/stars_500.gif", IF(Lead_Score__c >= 40, "/img/samples/stars_400.gif", IF(Lead_Score__c >= 30, "/img/samples/stars_300.gif", IF(Lead_Score__c >= 20, "/img/samples/stars_200.gif", IF(Lead_Score__c >= 10, "/img/samples/stars_100.gif", "/img/samples/stars_000.gif"))))),
IF(Lead_Score__c >= 50, "5 Star", IF(Lead_Score__c >= 40, "4 Star", IF(Lead_Score__c >= 30, "3 Star", IF(Lead_Score__c >= 20, "2 Star", IF(Lead_Score__c >= 10, "1 Star", "0 Star"))))) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays a star rating derived from the lead score. Higher ratings indicate higher-quality leads.
CustomField.label: Lead Rating
